jokes.text: Wake up, mother-. / Die, demon! / Why didn't you ever call me back?
jokes.setup: Reference to Tracy and Jenna's past St. Patrick's Day parade hosting disasters
jokes.punchline: The escalating inappropriate outbursts from wake up to demon to personal relationship drama
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation showing the chaos these characters can cause, with great economy of language

jokes.text: Unfortunately, unless Harry's law really took off this week and no one told me, you two are the biggest stars at the network
jokes.setup: Jack establishing Tracy and Jenna as NBC's biggest stars
jokes.punchline: The self-deprecating reference to NBC's actual struggling show Harry's Law
jokes.explanation: Meta-joke about NBC's actual programming struggles, perfectly delivered with Jack's corporate speak

jokes.text: On television, and when it comes to the assisted suicide debate
jokes.setup: Jenna claiming she and Tracy are total pros
jokes.punchline: The random pivot to assisted suicide debate expertise
jokes.explanation: Classic 30 Rock random non-sequitur, though not as strong as the show's best

jokes.text: Secret handshake, my baloney
jokes.setup: Establishing their friendship catchphrase
jokes.punchline: The complete nonsensical nature of 'my baloney' as a response
jokes.explanation: Weird but memorable catchphrase that becomes running gag - high quotability

jokes.text: It's the tail I had until I was 16
jokes.setup: Hazel giving Jenna something personal
jokes.punchline: The casual revelation she had a tail until teenage years
jokes.explanation: Perfectly delivered disturbing reveal that establishes Hazel's bizarre character immediately

jokes.text: I'll take care of Tracy and Jenna like they're my own children. Which is a bad example, because I left my kids at a sears in 2004
jokes.setup: Hazel promising to take good care of Tracy and Jenna
jokes.punchline: The immediate undermining that she abandoned her actual children
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy setup/punchline that perfectly establishes Hazel's unhinged character

jokes.text: He's only allergic to allergy medication. But he loves it
jokes.setup: Kenneth explaining Tracy's allergies
jokes.punchline: The paradox that he's allergic to the medicine but loves it anyway
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist joke about Tracy's bizarre medical issues

jokes.text: The U.S. Rodeo Association does not lift lifetime bans
jokes.setup: Hazel saying it's not literally her rodeo
jokes.punchline: The specific detail about being banned from rodeos
jokes.explanation: Another great Hazel bizarre backstory reveal delivered deadpan

jokes.text: Michael Lohan and vomiting into a bagpipe
jokes.setup: Liz sarcastically listing Ireland's great accomplishments
jokes.punchline: The combination of Lindsay Lohan's terrible father and gross bagpipe imagery
jokes.explanation: Decent cultural reference joke but relies on celebrity name-dropping

jokes.text: I will be wearing head-to-toe orange, in honor of protestant William of Orange, inventor of the Orange, according to Yahoo answers
jokes.setup: Liz's anti-Irish St. Patrick's Day stance
jokes.punchline: The completely wrong historical 'fact' sourced from Yahoo Answers
jokes.explanation: Great Liz Lemon know-it-all character moment with absurd misinformation

jokes.text: hurricane shamrock
jokes.setup: Liz describing avoiding St. Patrick's Day
jokes.punchline: Calling the Irish celebration a 'hurricane shamrock'
jokes.explanation: Clever meteorological wordplay that's very quotable

jokes.text: write a meandering play about how amazing the Irish are at not overcoming adversity
jokes.setup: Liz responding to being called offensive
jokes.punchline: The sarcastic analysis of Irish storytelling tropes
jokes.explanation: Brilliant cultural observation with perfect Liz Lemon intellectual snark

jokes.text: Please, without Germans, you wouldn't have any of the Indiana Jones movies
jokes.setup: Jack comparing Germans to Irish as beloved ethnic groups
jokes.punchline: Liz's twisted logic that Germans are necessary for Indiana Jones (as villains)
jokes.explanation: Clever twisted logic about ethnic representation in movies

jokes.text: I thought it was contributing to a retirement account
jokes.setup: Jack revealing Liz gave money to the IRA in the '90s
jokes.punchline: Liz's innocent confusion about what IRA meant
jokes.explanation: Perfect Liz moment - accidentally funding terrorism while trying to be responsible

jokes.text: Take it back, you witch!
jokes.setup: Jack putting a curse on Liz
jokes.punchline: Liz's immediate panicked belief in the curse
jokes.explanation: Sets up the curse plot but not particularly clever on its own

jokes.text: Hey, what are you doing? Get out of my studio! / Happy St. Patrick's day!
jokes.setup: Serious This American Life radio show
jokes.punchline: Drunk Irish person interrupting the intellectual NPR program
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between high and low culture, shows chaos of St. Patrick's Day

jokes.text: Didn't you hear my show on bullying?
jokes.setup: Ira Glass being physically manhandled
jokes.punchline: His ineffectual appeal to his anti-bullying radio show
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment for the intellectual NPR host - appealing to media instead of action

jokes.text: Megan! Megan! Look at them spin around. They're so confused. It's too many Megans, right?
jokes.setup: Liz calling out a common name on St. Patrick's Day
jokes.punchline: Multiple women responding and getting confused
jokes.explanation: Simple observational humor about common Irish names

jokes.text: You know what, I can't wait till the asians take over
jokes.setup: Praising Thai food delivery efficiency
jokes.punchline: The casual embrace of cultural takeover for convenience
jokes.explanation: Classic Liz casual inappropriate comment that reveals her priorities

jokes.text: I tried to steal beer from a Duane reade, and some black guy cold-cocked me. / Ooh, like a security guard? / I don't know, pal. I don't see people that way
jokes.setup: Dennis describing being punched after shoplifting
jokes.punchline: His claim to be colorblind while having just mentioned race
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Dennis character comedy - immediate contradiction of his 'enlightened' claim

jokes.text: Oh, Michael Jackson's ghost... / Oh, Great Kabbalah monster...
jokes.setup: Characters wanting to pray together
jokes.punchline: Their completely absurd prayer targets
jokes.explanation: Perfect absurdist character moment showing their bizarre belief systems

jokes.text: Oh, my God! They said my name first
jokes.setup: Hearing the parade promo on TV
jokes.punchline: Jenna's immediate focus on billing order over content
jokes.explanation: Classic Jenna vanity moment but fairly predictable

jokes.text: like on the set ocean's 12, when I put that snake in George Clooney's bed. I was not in the movie
jokes.setup: Tracy comparing situation to Hollywood prank
jokes.punchline: Revealing he wasn't actually in the movie he's referencing
jokes.explanation: Perfect Tracy delusion - casually revealing his fantasy stories as fact

jokes.text: You better not be talking about my dear friend, America Ferrera
jokes.setup: Jenna saying 'America wants to see'
jokes.punchline: Tracy thinking she's talking about the actress America Ferrera
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay confusion that fits Tracy's scattered thought process

jokes.text: I'll replace your lizard with a gay guy in a giant champagne bottle
jokes.setup: Jenna threatening Tracy about dressing rooms
jokes.punchline: The completely bizarre and specific threat involving champagne bottle
jokes.explanation: Completely absurd and highly quotable threat that's peak 30 Rock randomness

jokes.text: Siri, kill Jenna!
jokes.setup: Tracy getting angry at Jenna
jokes.punchline: Trying to use Siri for murder
jokes.explanation: Good technology joke showing Tracy's confusion about what Siri can do

jokes.text: The only baloney Tracy has is the baloney he's full of
jokes.setup: Reference to their 'my baloney' catchphrase
jokes.punchline: Jenna turning the baloney reference into an insult
jokes.explanation: Clever callback that corrupts their friendship phrase into an insult

jokes.text: I killed Jenna elfman. / Is that right?
jokes.setup: Tracy making random violent claim
jokes.punchline: Hazel's complete non-reaction to murder confession
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan reaction to Tracy's absurd claim - great character moment for both

jokes.text: Jenna thinks that Christina Aguilera lost her voice during childbirth
jokes.setup: Explaining why they don't let them watch NBC
jokes.punchline: Jenna's bizarre misunderstanding of Christina Aguilera's career
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist explanation of celebrity confusion that fits Jenna's character

jokes.text: Why don't we drive to Sears? I'll buy you a toy
jokes.setup: Hazel trying to manage Tracy like a child
jokes.punchline: The callback to her abandoning her kids at Sears
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark callback showing Hazel's terrible parenting history repeating

jokes.text: None of the writers can go out on St. Patrick's day because we all have faces people naturally just want to punch
jokes.setup: Explaining why writers are hiding indoors
jokes.punchline: The specific self-awareness about their punchable faces
jokes.explanation: Brilliant self-aware observation about comedy writer stereotypes - highly quotable

jokes.text: Colonizers of Malaar. It's a strategy board game from the makers Goblet quest and virginity keep
jokes.setup: Describing their fantasy board game
jokes.punchline: The escalating nerd game names ending with 'virginity keep'
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalating nerd joke names that get progressively more on-the-nose

jokes.text: but that means I control all the wheat!
jokes.setup: Frank explaining his game position
jokes.punchline: His intense excitement about controlling virtual wheat
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Frank's nerd enthusiasm

jokes.text: You've got to replace 'Malaar' with 'Fairfield, Connecticut,' and 'unicorn' with... unicorn, a death Ray
jokes.setup: Jack explaining business principles through the game
jokes.punchline: The reveal that his real business also involves death rays
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Jack moment revealing his corporate schemes are as fantastical as the game

jokes.text: I got this new business where I burn your old DVDs onto laserdisc
jokes.setup: Dennis claiming to be an entrepreneur
jokes.punchline: The completely backwards technology 'advancement'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis stupidity - completely missing the point of technological progress

jokes.text: I don't have health insurance because of Obama
jokes.setup: Dennis refusing ambulance
jokes.punchline: Blaming Obama for not having insurance (when Obama expanded coverage)
jokes.explanation: Good Dennis political ignorance but somewhat predictable

jokes.text: At burning man, and we agreed never to talk about that. At sunset, the CACTI start to resemble people looking for hugs
jokes.setup: Criss revealing EMT experience
jokes.punchline: The disturbing Burning Man hallucination detail
jokes.explanation: Great unexpected dark backstory for the usually normal Criss

jokes.text: We're bang brothers
jokes.setup: Dennis describing his relationship with Criss
jokes.punchline: The inappropriate term 'bang brothers'
jokes.explanation: Appropriately crude Dennis term but not particularly clever

jokes.text: It's like sex, but your husband isn't looking at a picture of a bridge
jokes.setup: Jenna comparing live TV to sex
jokes.punchline: The specific detail about her husband's bridge fetish
jokes.explanation: Brilliant bizarre sexual detail that's peak Jenna oversharing - highly quotable

jokes.text: After you PMS-ed about their names yesterday, I thought numbers would make everyone happy
jokes.setup: Hazel explaining the hosting mix-up
jokes.punchline: Her misguided attempt to solve the problem making it worse
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Hazel's well-meaning incompetence

jokes.text: Would a third host help? I am S.A.G. eligible, but I will only do nude stuff if there's a mirror behind me
jokes.setup: Hazel offering to help with hosting
jokes.punchline: Her bizarre nudity condition involving mirrors
jokes.explanation: Another great bizarre Hazel moment with very specific conditions

jokes.text: That failed... And the Orcs raped everybody
jokes.setup: Describing game outcomes
jokes.punchline: The casual mention of fantasy rape
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation but relies on shock value rather than cleverness

jokes.text: Thanks a lot, Klootzak. I don't come to where you work and slap the...
jokes.setup: Frank getting angry at Jack's interference
jokes.punchline: The cut-off angry rant with the made-up insult 'Klootzak'
jokes.explanation: Good escalating anger with amusing fake foreign insult

jokes.text: And you would presume to wield the scepter of Thalbain?
jokes.setup: Game getting intense
jokes.punchline: Lutz's dramatic fantasy game language challenge
jokes.explanation: Good nerd escalation moment but not exceptional

jokes.text: Dennis Duffy is like the Terminator with cheaper sunglasses
jokes.setup: Liz explaining Dennis's persistent nature
jokes.punchline: The specific comparison to Terminator but with cheap accessories
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character analysis with perfect detail about cheap sunglasses

jokes.text: You'll be back. / If I ever see you again, I'll kill you. / You'll be back, Liz Lemon. You'll be back
jokes.setup: Dennis's persistent confidence
jokes.punchline: His unshakeable belief despite death threats
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis delusion - completely immune to rejection, highly quotable

jokes.text: Guy with a concussion on St. Patrick's day is like a horse with a broken leg. / Exactly. We should shoot him
jokes.setup: Criss making a comparison about Dennis's condition
jokes.punchline: Liz taking the horse analogy to its logical violent conclusion
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy escalation with perfect economy - Liz's practical solution

jokes.text: Criss, get in here. There's a lez movie on showtime
jokes.setup: Dennis trying to bond with Criss
jokes.punchline: His crude way of describing lesbian content
jokes.explanation: Appropriately crude Dennis moment but not particularly clever

jokes.text: I'm trapped in a barren wasteland, and no matter what I do, I can't get out. Wait. Oh, my God, it's happening again. The desert of Kroth is Kabletown
jokes.setup: Jack describing his game position
jokes.punchline: Realizing the fantasy game mirrors his real corporate situation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-moment connecting fantasy and reality - perfect Jack revelation

jokes.text: I'm putting an old German curse on you
jokes.setup: Jack responding to Liz's curse situation
jokes.punchline: Escalating to ethnic curse warfare
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the curse plot but not exceptional

jokes.text: when I wake up, we're on our honeymoon. At seaworld
jokes.setup: Liz describing Dennis's potential kidnapping scenario
jokes.punchline: The specific detail about SeaWorld honeymoon
jokes.explanation: Good specific detail that shows Dennis's terrible romantic ideas

jokes.text: And once again, the puppet will become the puppet master. / What does that mean, 'once again'? That's not a thing
jokes.setup: Liz making dramatic declaration
jokes.punchline: Criss pointing out her nonsensical reference
jokes.explanation: Great Criss moment calling out Liz's pretentious nonsense

jokes.text: Their daughter, she goes off to college, and Mark Ruffalo, he's just gonna do his own thing with the restaurant
jokes.setup: Dennis describing the 'lez movie' plot
jokes.punchline: His confused understanding making it sound like a normal family drama
jokes.explanation: Good Dennis confusion about what he's watching

jokes.text: She's a card girl at kangaroo boxing matches, so she's got a body, and she's loaded. Her grandfather invented the stop sign
jokes.setup: Dennis describing his girlfriend
jokes.punchline: The increasingly absurd details ending with stop sign invention
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis absurdist escalation - kangaroo boxing to stop sign fortune

jokes.text: Love you. / You're the best. / Love you. / Scooby-doo. / I love you. / I just ordered thai food
jokes.setup: Montage of Criss saying 'I love you'
jokes.punchline: Liz's increasingly absurd deflections ending with Thai food
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalating montage showing Liz's emotional avoidance patterns

jokes.text: Why, because you both have had huge weight fluctuations?
jokes.setup: Tracy saying Al Roker should be on his side
jokes.punchline: Jenna's inappropriate weight comment about Al Roker
jokes.explanation: Appropriately inappropriate Jenna comment but not particularly clever

jokes.text: By starting a fire and then rescuing everyone from it? And then I'm a hero and then I'm Playboy?
jokes.setup: Hazel worried about getting kicked out of show business
jokes.punchline: Her bizarre plan involving arson and Playboy modeling
jokes.explanation: Classic Hazel deranged logic - arson as career move

jokes.text: Whoa, buy me a drink first.
jokes.setup: Jack mentioning feeling impotent
jokes.punchline: Priest making sexual innuendo about confession
jokes.explanation: Mild sexual humor from unexpected source. Economical but not particularly original.

jokes.text: His only worldly possession was no snakes
jokes.setup: Priest explaining St. Patrick's story
jokes.punchline: The weird phrasing making 'no snakes' sound like a possession
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay about St. Patrick's situation

jokes.text: I passed out laughing on 69th Street
jokes.setup: Megan explaining why she's late
jokes.punchline: Finding the street number so hilarious she passed out
jokes.explanation: Good character establishment for Dennis's equally immature wife

jokes.text: You got two minutes to fill a sock with quarters, and then we go outside
jokes.setup: Megan learning Liz said she loved Dennis
jokes.punchline: The specific old-fashioned street fighting preparation
jokes.explanation: Great specific threat that shows Megan's old-school approach to fighting

jokes.text: You got two minutes to fill a sock with quarters, and then we go outside.
jokes.setup: Megan hearing Liz said she loved Dennis
jokes.punchline: Specific, old-fashioned threat preparation
jokes.explanation: Great specific threat with old-school street fighting preparation. Shows Megan's working-class toughness.

jokes.text: You're the most Irish person here
jokes.setup: Dennis listing Liz's Irish traits
jokes.punchline: The realization that anti-Irish Liz is actually the most Irish
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character observation that reframes the entire episode - perfect irony

jokes.text: Is 70 not a good IQ?
jokes.setup: Hazel reflecting on her mistakes
jokes.punchline: Casually revealing her extremely low IQ
jokes.explanation: Perfect Hazel moment - explains everything about her character in one line

jokes.text: And not just 'cause today's the day that guy that tried to kill me gets out of jail
jokes.setup: Tracy saying he's scared
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning an assassination attempt
jokes.explanation: Good Tracy casual mention of extreme danger

jokes.text: When I was a kid, you could get a prostitute for $5
jokes.setup: Tracy doing Andy Rooney impression
jokes.punchline: The completely inappropriate subject matter for the wholesome segment
jokes.explanation: Good Tracy inappropriate Andy Rooney parody

jokes.text: I'm going to turn my desert into glass, and glass is a commodity that you all need
jokes.setup: Jack's dramatic game strategy
jokes.punchline: The elaborate business plan for fantasy glass
jokes.explanation: Great Jack moment applying real business thinking to fantasy game

jokes.text: I'm going to turn my desert into glass, and glass is a commodity that you all need, for your elfin oracle mirrors, for your crystal palace, for the colorful glass beads that you keep buying for some reason.
jokes.setup: Jack explaining his scorched earth business strategy
jokes.punchline: Applying sophisticated economics to ridiculous fantasy needs
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jack moment - ruthless business strategy applied to fantasy game. Shows his competitive nature and intelligence.

jokes.text: for the colorful glass beads that you keep buying for some reason. / I'm going to wear them to the pirates' ball
jokes.setup: Jack questioning the beads purchase
jokes.punchline: Lutz's matter-of-fact pirate ball explanation
jokes.explanation: Perfect absurdist exchange - Lutz's casual pirate ball reference

jokes.text: Today Malaar... Tomorrow Kabletown.
jokes.setup: Jack's fantasy game victory
jokes.punchline: Applies gaming success to real corporate ambitions
jokes.explanation: Perfect culmination of the game storyline. Great structure and character payoff.

jokes.text: I am a virgin... with white guys.
jokes.setup: Sue declaring something about being a virgin
jokes.punchline: Unexpected racial specification
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with unexpected specificity. Shows Sue's character complexity beyond writer stereotype.

jokes.text: I am a virgin... with white guys
jokes.setup: Lutz being crowned king
jokes.punchline: The overshare about racial sexual experience
jokes.explanation: Decent misdirection but relies on uncomfortable oversharing

jokes.text: More importantly, I have never been with someone for longer than nine months. You and I have been together for six, so I assume something will go wrong soon
jokes.setup: Liz trying to express feelings
jokes.punchline: Her pessimistic relationship analysis
jokes.explanation: Good Liz character moment showing her self-sabotaging tendencies

jokes.text: I don't understand your art, Kevin
jokes.setup: St. Patrick's Day street scene
jokes.punchline: Random overheard conversation about art criticism
jokes.explanation: Minor background gag, adds atmosphere but not exceptional

jokes.text: You solo-ed me.
jokes.setup: Liz saying 'I love you' and Criss responding 'I know'
jokes.punchline: Star Wars reference for romantic moment
jokes.explanation: Perfect pop culture reference that fits the moment. Shows Criss's nerd credentials and lightens romantic tension.

jokes.text: You solo-ed me
jokes.setup: Criss saying 'I know' to Liz's 'I love you'
jokes.punchline: Liz recognizing the Star Wars reference
jokes.explanation: Good pop culture callback that works for the romantic moment

jokes.text: That is a person named Liz Lemon who just told some dude she loves him. Well, I have known her for a long time and she never said that before
jokes.setup: TV coverage of Liz and Criss on the street
jokes.punchline: Tracy's TV commentary about character development
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-moment with Tracy as TV critic analyzing character growth

jokes.text: Also, TV viewers liked when in a show is a song
jokes.setup: Tracy's TV analysis continuing
jokes.punchline: The abrupt transition to musical performance
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the song ending, meta-awareness of TV tropes
